summary: Markets show cautious optimism amid Bitcoin pressure from the impending Fed chair transition to Kevin Warsh in May 2026, with gold surging strongly and modest economic growth expected alongside slower monetary easing. Crypto futures volumes remain robust despite recent dips, while institutional integration signals transformative growth. Commodities like gold lead gains, overshadowing slight equity pullbacks.
